            ThisForm.Components("StatEdit").Enabled = bSetEnabled
            ThisForm.Components("StatGridCol").Enabled = bSetEnabled

            'I believe there's no need to check for new record here
            'Get special enable flags

            CoNum = PriCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CoNum")
            CustNum = PriCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustNum")
            UseExchRate = PriCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("UseExchRate")
            CustomerUseExchRate = PriCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CusUseExchRate")

            ThisForm.Variables("vCoNum").Value = CoNum
            ThisForm.Variables("vCustNum").Value = CustNum
            ThisForm.Variables("vUseExchRate").Value = UseExchRate
            ' Initial values for the flags taken from the GetCoCompEnableFlagsSp code.
            ThisForm.Variables("vEdiOrder").Value = "0"
            ThisForm.Variables("vLcrRequired").Value = "0"
            ThisForm.Variables("vEnableOrderType").Value = "1"
            ThisForm.Variables("vEnableConsolidate").Value = "1"
            ThisForm.Variables("vEnableEffExpDate").Value = "1"

            ' This logic was taken from the GetCoCompEnableFlagsSp, which now does not
            ' need to be called if there is not yet a customer order number.

            If CustomerUseExchRate = UseExchRate And UseExchRate <> "" Then
                ThisForm.Variables("vEnableConsolidate").Value = "1"
            Else
                ThisForm.Variables("vEnableConsolidate").Value = "0"
            End If

            If CoNum <> "" Or CustNum <> "" Then
                ThisForm.GenerateEvent("GetCoCompEnableFlags")
            End If

            bBlanket = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectPropertyInternal("Type") = "B"
            bLineExists = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectPropertyInternal("DerLineExists") = "1"

            'Enable/Disable Delete
            If Not bOrigSite Then
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.DeleteEnabled = False
            Else
                ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.DeleteEnabled = True
            End If


            If PriCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Stat") <> "C" And
               PriCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Stat") <> "H" And
               PriCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Stat") <> "S" Then
                bSetEnabled = True
            Else
                bSetEnabled = False
            End If

            'Determine enable state of consolidate
            If bSetEnabled And ThisForm.Variables("vEdiOrder").Value = "0" And CBool(ThisForm.Variables("vEnableConsolidate").Value) Then
                bSetEnabled = True
            Else
                bSetEnabled = False
            End If

            EnableDisableExchRate()

            Exit Function

ErrorHandler:
            Application.ShowMessage(Err.Description)
            EnableComponents = CInt(1)
        End Function

        '***********************************************************
        'Check for PO Exists in both unsaved client records and in
        'existing records in database.
        '***********************************************************
        Sub CheckPoExistsWarning(Optional ByVal strCoNum As String = "")
            Dim i As Integer
            Dim iCurrIndex As Integer
            Dim oCache As IWSIDOCollection
            Dim strCurrPo As String
            Dim strCurrCustNum As String
            Dim bWarningGiven As Boolean

            bWarningGiven = False
            oCache = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection
            strCurrPo = oCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustPo")
            strCurrCustNum = oCache.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustNum")
            iCurrIndex = oCache.GetCurrentObjectIndex
            ' If there is no customer PO #, then there is no checking for it needed.

            If strCurrPo = "" Then Exit Sub
            i = 0
            Do While i <= oCache.GetNumEntries - 1 And Not bWarningGiven
                If Not oCache.IsObjectDeleted(i) And
                  (oCache.IsObjectModified(i) Or oCache.IsObjectNew(i)) Then
                    If iCurrIndex <> i And
                    strCurrCustNum <> "" And
                    strCurrCustNum = oCache.GetObjectProperty("CustNum", i) And
                    strCurrPo <> "" And
                    strCurrPo = oCache.GetObjectProperty("CustPo", i) Then
                        ThisForm.GenerateEvent("CustPoWarning_Client")
                        bWarningGiven = True
                    End If
                End If
                i = i + 1
            Loop
            If Not bWarningGiven Then
                ThisForm.GenerateEvent("CustPoWarning_DB")
            End If
        End Sub

        Sub RetrieveFilterValueForRegular()
            Dim i As Integer
            Dim strLevel As String
            Dim oNodelist As System.Xml.XmlNodeList
            Dim oNode As System.Xml.XmlNode
            Dim oNodelistline As System.Xml.XmlNodeList
            Dim xmlDoc As New System.Xml.XmlDocument
            strLevel = ThisForm.Components("RegularOrderTree").TreeExpandingNodeToXml
            xmlDoc.LoadXml(strLevel)
            oNodelist = xmlDoc.GetElementsByTagName("nodeData")
            oNodelistline = xmlDoc.GetElementsByTagName("nodeData")
            For Each oNode In oNodelist
                i = CInt(oNode.Attributes("level").Value)
                If i = 1 Then
                    ThisForm.Variables("CoLineVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoLine").Value
                ElseIf i = 2 Then
                    ThisForm.Variables("CoReleaseVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoRelease").Value
                End If
            Next

        Sub LaunchForm()

            Dim strLevel As String
            Dim i As Integer
            Dim iCount As Integer
            Dim oNode As System.Xml.XmlNode = Nothing
            Dim oNodelist As System.Xml.XmlNodeList
            Dim xmlDoc As New System.Xml.XmlDocument
            If ThisForm.Components("TypeEdit").Value = "R" Then
                iCount = 0
                i = ThisForm.Components("RegularOrderTree").TreeGetCurLevel
                strLevel = ThisForm.Components("RegularOrderTree").TreeSelectedNodesToXml()
                xmlDoc.LoadXml(strLevel)
                oNodelist = xmlDoc.GetElementsByTagName("nodeData")

                For Each oNode In oNodelist
                    If i = CInt(oNode.Attributes("level").Value) Then
                        iCount = iCount + 1
                    End If
                Next
                If i = 0 Then
                    ThisForm.GenerateEvent("MsgDisp")
                ElseIf i = 1 Then
                    If iCount = 1 Then
                        oNode = oNodelist.Item(0)
                        ThisForm.Variables("CoLineVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoLine").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("LinkedChildFilter").Value = "CoLine='V(CoLineVariable)'"
                    Else
                        ThisForm.Variables("LinkedChildFilter").Value = ""
                    End If
                    ThisForm.GenerateEvent("LaunchCustomerOrderLines")
                ElseIf i = 2 Then
                    If iCount = 1 Then
                        oNode = oNodelist.Item(0)
                        ThisForm.Variables("CoLineVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoLine").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("CoReleaseVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoRelease").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("ShipDateVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("ShipDate").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("DateSeqVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("DateSeq").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("LinkedChildFilter").Value = "CoLine='V(CoLineVariable)' AND " &
                                                            "CoRelease = 'V(CoReleaseVariable)'AND " &
                                                            "ShipDate = 'V(ShipDateVariable)'AND " &
                                                            "DateSeq = 'V(DateSeqVariable)'"

                    Else
                        ThisForm.Variables("CoLineVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoLine").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("LinkedChildFilter").Value = "CoLine='V(CoLineVariable)'"

                    ThisForm.GenerateEvent("LaunchOrderShipments")

                        oNode = oNodelist.Item(0)

                        ThisForm.Variables("CoReleaseVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoRelease").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("LinkedChildFilter").Value = "CoLine='V(CoLineVariable)' AND " &
                                                                                    "CoRelease = 'V(CoReleaseVariable)'"
                    Else
                        ThisForm.Variables("CoLineVariable").Value = oNode.Attributes("CoLine").Value
                        ThisForm.Variables("LinkedChildFilter").Value = "CoLine='V(CoLineVariable)'"

                    End If
                    ThisForm.GenerateEvent("LaunchCustomerOrderBlanketReleases")

        Sub CheckConfigID()
            Dim i As Integer
            Dim currentIndex As Integer

            If Not ThisForm.Variables("vCopyFlag").Value = "1" Then
                Exit Sub
            End If

            currentIndex = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectIndex()

            For i = 0 To ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetNumEntries - 1
                If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.Items(i).Item("UbSourceCoNum").GetValueOfString("") <> "" And
                        ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.Items(i).Item("UbSourceConfigID").GetValueOfString("") <> "" Then
                    ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObject(i)
                    ThisForm.GenerateEvent("CopyConfig")
                    ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.RefreshCurrentObject()
                End If
            Next

            ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObject(currentIndex)
            ThisForm.Variables("vCopyFlag").Value = "0"
        End Sub

        Sub ApplyRateShoppingValues()
            Dim ido As IWSIDOCollection = ThisForm.CurrentIDOCollection

            Dim FreightAmount As Decimal = ThisForm.Variables("CarrierFreightAmount").GetValueOfDecimal(0.00D)
            Dim ShipVia As String = ThisForm.Variables("CarrierShipViaVar").GetValueOfString("")
            Dim ServiceLevelCode As String = ThisForm.Variables("CarrierServiceLevelCodeVar").GetValueOfString("")

            Dim ShipCodeProp As IWSIDOProperty = ido.CurrentItem.Item("ShipCode")
            Dim FreightProp As IWSIDOProperty = ido.CurrentItem.Item("Freight")
            Dim ServiceTypeProp As IWSIDOProperty = ido.CurrentItem.Item("CarrierServiceType")

            If (ShipVia <> "" And ShipCodeProp.GetValueOfString("") = "") Then
                ShipCodeProp.SetValuePlusModifyRefresh(ShipVia)
            End If

            If (ServiceLevelCode <> "") Then
                ServiceTypeProp.SetValuePlusModifyRefresh(ServiceLevelCode)
            End If

            If (FreightAmount <> 0.00D) Then
                FreightProp.SetValuePlusModifyRefresh(FreightAmount)
            End If


        End Sub

        Sub SetFormInitials()
            If ThisForm.Variables("parm_DisplayTransactionNumInTitleBar").GetValueOfByte(0) = 1 Then
                Dim maxStringLength As Integer = 501
                Dim captionChars(maxStringLength) As Char
                Dim initialsStr As String = ""

                ThisForm.Caption.ToCharArray.CopyTo(captionChars, 0)
                initialsStr += captionChars(0).ToString()

                For i As Integer = 1 To (captionChars.Length - 1)
                    If captionChars(i) = " " Then
                        initialsStr += captionChars(i + 1).ToString()
                    End If
                Next

                ThisForm.Variables("varFormInitials").SetValue(initialsStr)
            End If
        End Sub

      Sub SetMXPeriodicity()
          Dim loadSLCustomersIDO As LoadCollectionResponseData
          Dim loadMXSATParmsIDO As LoadCollectionResponseData
          Dim strInvFreq As String
          Dim IsConsolidate As String
          IsConsolidate = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Consolidate")

         If (Application.Variables("IsCSIB_97762ActiveVar").Value = "1" And Application.Variables("Avail_MX").Value = "1")
            ThisForm.Components("InvFreqEdit").Enabled = False
            ThisForm.Components("InvFreqGridCol").Enabled = False
            loadSLCustomersIDO = IDOClient.LoadCollection("SLCustomers", "InvFreq,CustNum,CustSeq", "CustNum = '" + ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustNum") + "' AND CustSeq = 0", "", 1)
            loadMXSATParmsIDO = IDOClient.LoadCollection("MXSATParms", "InvFreq,GlobalInvCustNum,GlobalInvCustSeq", "GlobalInvCustNum = '" + ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustNum") + "' AND GlobalInvCustSeq = 0", "", 1)

            If(IsConsolidate = "1")               
               If(loadSLCustomersIDO.Items.Count = 1)
                  If(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew)
                     strInvFreq = loadSLCustomersIDO(0, "InvFreq").ToString()
                     If (strInvFreq = "" And loadMXSATParmsIDO.Items.Count = 1)
                        strInvFreq = loadMXSATParmsIDO(0, "InvFreq").ToString()
                        If (strInvFreq = "")
                           strInvFreq = "W"
                        End If
                     End If
                     ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectProperty("InvFreq", strInvFreq)
                  Else
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").SetValue(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("InvFreq"))
                     ThisForm.Components("InvFreqEdit").SetValue(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("InvFreq"))
                  End If

                  If (loadMXSATParmsIDO.Items.Count = 1)
                     ThisForm.Components("InvFreqEdit").Enabled = False
                     ThisForm.Components("InvFreqGridCol").Enabled = False
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Enabled = True
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Enabled = True
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Visible = True
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Visible = True
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeStatic").Visible = True
                  Else
                     ThisForm.Components("InvFreqEdit").Enabled = True
                     ThisForm.Components("InvFreqGridCol").Enabled = True
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Enabled = False
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Enabled = False
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Visible = False
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Visible = False
                     ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeStatic").Visible = False
                  End If
               Else
                  ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Enabled = False
                  ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Enabled = False
                  ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Visible = False
                  ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Visible = False
                  ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeStatic").Visible = False
               End If
            Else
               ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.SetCurrentObjectProperty("InvFreq", "")
               ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Enabled = False
               ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Enabled = False
               ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeEdit").Visible = False
               ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityGridCol").Visible = False
               ThisForm.Components("MXPeriodicityTypeStatic").Visible = False
            End If
         Else
            If(IsConsolidate = "1")
               ThisForm.Components("InvFreqEdit").Enabled = True
               ThisForm.Components("InvFreqGridCol").Enabled = True
            Else
               ThisForm.Components("InvFreqEdit").Enabled = False
               ThisForm.Components("InvFreqGridCol").Enabled = False
            End If         
         End If
      End Sub
